scheme_name: Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks
page_title: Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks

details: The scheme “Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks” is implemented by the Directorate of Sanskrit Education under the Department of Sanskrit Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education by providing free Sanskrit textbooks to students studying in Classes 1 to 12.
benefits: Each student is provided annual financial assistance under the scheme as follows:
eligibility: The students studying in Classes 1 to 12 at Sanskrit schools across Uttarakhand are eligible.

online: The application of the concerned student is first forwarded/recommended by the school principal and then further recommended by the Assistant Director of the respective district.
Required documents include the student’s Aadhaar card and bank account details.
For students studying in the same class during the same session, the student or their guardian can apply online through the

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students studying in classes 1 to 12 of Sanskrit schools in Uttarakhand are eligible.

faqs.question: Is the assistance given in cash or textbooks?
faqs.answer: The assistance is provided as financial aid to purchase textbooks.

faqs.question: Who forwards the student’s application?
faqs.answer: The application is first forwarded/recommended by the school principal.

faqs.question: Who approves the application after the principal’s recommendation?
faqs.answer: The Assistant Director of the respective district recommends the application further.

faqs.question: What documents are required for application?
faqs.answer: Aadhaar card of the student Bank account details of the student Aadhaar card of the student Bank account details of the student

faqs.question: Can the student apply online?
faqs.answer: Yes, the student or their guardian can apply online through the Aapni Sarkar portal. https://eservices.uk.gov.in/
